description:
A background process is preventing the encrypted volume mounted at '/home/ga/MountPoints/secure_logs' from dismounting. You must:

1. Identify the specific process (PID and Command Name) that is holding the volume open.
2. Create an incident report at '/home/ga/Documents/lock_incident.txt' containing the identified PID and Command Name.
3. Successfully dismount the volume (you may force dismount or terminate the locking process).

The volume is located at '/home/ga/Volumes/log_storage.hc'.
